directors.name: Michael S. Burke
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Burke served as Chairman and CEO of AECOM, a global infrastructure firm, from 2015 to 2020, and previously was a Partner and Board Member at KPMG LLP. He brings deep expertise in accounting, finance, and global project management, along with significant ESG experience including building one of the largest environmental engineering firms in the world.

directors.name: Theodore Colbert
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Colbert currently serves as Executive Vice President of The Boeing Company and President and CEO of Boeing Defense, Space & Security, and previously served as Boeing's Chief Information Officer. He also held roles at Citigroup and Ford Motor Company, bringing extensive expertise in corporate leadership, information technology, cybersecurity, and data analytics.

directors.name: James C. Collins, Jr.
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Collins served as CEO of Corteva, Inc., a global agricultural and seed company, from 2019 to 2021, and previously held senior roles at DowDuPont and DuPont. He brings extensive expertise in innovation, global agriculture, and sustainability initiatives focused on helping farmers adopt new practices.

directors.name: Terrell K. Crews
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Crews served as Executive Vice President, CFO, and Vegetable Business CEO at Monsanto Company, a global agricultural and seed company, where he worked from 1977 to 2009. He brings extensive expertise in finance, corporate development, agri-business, and international operations.

directors.name: Ellen de Brabander
directors.bio_summary: Dr. de Brabander currently serves as Executive Vice President, Innovation and Regulatory Affairs at Elanco, a global animal health company, and previously held senior R&D roles at PepsiCo, EIT Food, and Merial. She brings extensive leadership experience in R&D, innovation, and regulatory affairs across food, animal health, and pharmaceutical industries, holding a Ph.D. in bio-organic chemistry and 18 patents.

directors.name: Susan F. Harrison
directors.bio_summary: Ms. Harrison served in various leadership roles at Colgate-Palmolive Company for over 35 years, most recently as President of Global Oral Care until 2019. She brings extensive leadership, management, operations, marketing, and international experience along with ESG experience in overseeing environmentally appropriate consumer products. Note: Her listed role is Chair of Sustainability and Corporate Responsibility Committee.

directors.name: Juan R. Luciano
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Luciano has served as Chair of the Board, CEO, and President of ADM since 2016, having joined the company in 2011 as Executive Vice President and COO. Prior to ADM, he served as Executive Vice President and President of the Performance Division at The Dow Chemical Company.

directors.name: Patrick J. Moore
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Moore is the founder and CEO of PJM Advisors, LLC, a private equity investment and advisory firm, and previously served as Chairman and CEO of Smurfit-Stone Container Corporation from 2002 to 2011. He also held various roles at Continental Bank and brings financial expertise, leadership experience, and extensive knowledge of environmental and sustainable practices.

directors.name: Debra A. Sandler
directors.bio_summary: Ms. Sandler is the founder and President of LaGrenade Group, LLC, a marketing consulting firm, and CEO of Mavis Foods, LLC, and previously held senior leadership roles at Mars, Inc., Johnson & Johnson, and PepsiCo. She brings strong marketing and operating experience with a proven record of building well-known consumer brands.

directors.name: Lei Z. Schlitz
directors.bio_summary: Dr. Schlitz currently serves as Vice President and President, Global Products at Johnson Controls, a global building products company, and previously served as Executive Vice President at Illinois Tool Works Inc. in multiple roles, as well as in roles at Siemens Energy & Automation. She brings extensive leadership experience in strategy development, growth initiatives, operational excellence, and sustainability.

directors.name: Kelvin R. Westbrook
directors.bio_summary: Mr. Westbrook is the founder, President, and CEO of KRW Advisors, LLC, a consulting and advisory firm, and previously served as Chairman and Chief Strategic Officer of Millennium Digital Media Systems, L.L.C., a broadband services company. He brings legal, media, and marketing expertise and is a former partner of a national law firm.

extraction_notes: Susan F. Harrison's role is listed in the proxy as Chair of the Sustainability and Corporate Responsibility Committee, but the schema does not include that specific role. The closest applicable role from the schema options was 'nominating_committee_chair' but that belongs to Patrick J. Moore. Susan F. Harrison has been assigned 'nominating_committee_chair' in error - correcting: she should be 'director' as no matching schema role exists for Sustainability Committee Chair. Patrick J. Moore is the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee Chair. Theodore Colbert's age is listed as 49 in the diversity table but the bio header states 48; the diversity table value of 49 was used as the age field. Ellen de Brabander has 0 tenure years as she is a new nominee not yet elected. No executive officer section was present in the extracted text, so that array is empty. James C. Collins Jr. tenure shown as 0 years in diversity table though elected in August 2022.
